owasp_mcp.name: Token Mismanagement & Secret Exposure
owasp_mcp.description: Improper handling of API keys, tokens, secrets.

owasp_mcp.name: Excessive Permissions & Privilege Escalation
owasp_mcp.description: Overly broad tool/file permissions and privileged execution.

owasp_mcp.name: Tool Poisoning
owasp_mcp.description: Malicious instructions in tool descriptions and poisoned tool payloads.

owasp_mcp.name: Supply Chain Attacks
owasp_mcp.description: Dependency tampering, typosquatting, and vulnerable package usage.

owasp_mcp.name: Command Injection
owasp_mcp.description: Unsanitized command execution and shell abuse.

owasp_mcp.name: Prompt Injection
owasp_mcp.description: Injection via instruction files, tool descriptions, and Unicode obfuscation.

owasp_mcp.name: Insufficient Authentication
owasp_mcp.description: Missing auth and weak exposure controls on MCP endpoints.

owasp_mcp.name: Insufficient Logging
owasp_mcp.description: Insufficient audit traceability for agent actions.

owasp_mcp.name: Context Over-sharing
owasp_mcp.description: Cross-server context and credential leakage/exfiltration risks.
